natural_generation: Oaktrapdoors generate inplainsvillages,iglooswith basements, andshipwrecks.
Sprucetrapdoors generate intaigavillages and shipwrecks.
Jungletrapdoors generate indesertvillages (aroundcomposters) and shipwrecks.
Dark oaktrapdoors generate in shipwrecks.
